seo.title: About — {{SITE_NAME}}
seo.description: Learn more about {{SITE_NAME}} and our mission.

blocks.body:
# About {{SITE_NAME}}

We are a team passionate about building great products. Our mission is to help businesses succeed with technology that works.

## Our Story

Founded with a simple idea: technology should empower, not complicate. We build tools and platforms that let our clients focus on what they do best.

## Our Values

- **Quality first** — We never cut corners.
- **Transparency** — Open communication at every step.
- **Continuous improvement** — Always learning, always shipping.
